approvalGate: User approved channel publication on 2026-05-19; future posts still require explicit approval before channel send.

telegramMessage.captionLimitGate: Keep visible caption text below 1024 characters when sending as Telegram photo caption.
telegramMessage.linkStyleRule: Use Telegram HTML links: visible text only, URL hidden in href. Do not paste raw long URLs into the visible message.

telegramMessage.implementationNote: Telegram Desktop GUI route verified: attach photo, paste HTML clipboard into caption via context menu to preserve embedded links, invoke the Send button through UI Automation.

workflowRule: After MIIIIPS event publication and live verification, prepare Telegram follow-up draft from transcript, attach the event photo, verify Moonn paid lecture route and four standing Moonn links, send a private Telegram preview, stop for explicit user approval, then publish to https://t.me/moonn_official and store proof.
